title: [Thanatoph, Wide Ledge]
description: Wide and sheltered, the ledge offers a respite from the cold wind howling outside.  Worn smooth from years of providing shelter, the ledge also offers a few comfortable boulders to lean against.  The ledge reaches back about fifteen feet before running abruptly into a cracked and fissured stone wall.

wayto.3753: ;e group_members = nil; clear.reverse.each { |line| if line =~ /^Obvious (paths|exits)/; break; elsif line =~ /^([A-Za-z ,]+) followed\.$/; group_members = $1.split(/, | and /); group_members.delete_if { |m| m =~ /^[Yy]our / }; group_members = nil if group_members.empty?; break; end }; move 'climb ledge'; if group_members; echo "Waiting for your group... "; begin; if get =~ /^(You reach out and hold )?([A-z][a-z]+)('s hand| joins your group)\.$/; group_members.delete $2; end; end while group_members.length > 0; end; waitrt?
